word: H8637 - תִּרְגַּל - tirgal - teer-gal' - Teach to go

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּרגּל

Transliteration: tirgal

Phonetic: teer-gal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to go on foot, spy out, cause to walk
    1. (Tiphel) to teach to walk

Origin: a denominative from H7270

TWOT entry: 2113

Part(s) of speech: Verb
